About
WHO IS
FYNN WESSELS?

I'm a 19-year-old funded trader from Switzerland. I trade MNQ & MES futures with $50,000 in funded capital — money that's not mine to lose. I built Flow Theory to share the exact system I use, so you can skip the years of trial and error I went through.

No signal groups. No "guaranteed profits." Just real education that actually works in today's market.

This is for you if...
01
You're tired of losing money
You've been trading for a while but nothing clicks. You need a real, repeatable strategy — not random entries.
02
You want to get funded
You want to trade prop firm capital without risking your own money. I'll show you exactly how to pass the evaluation.
03
You're just getting started
You're new to trading and want to learn from someone who's actually in the market — not someone selling a dream.
